thoughts: I want to see how the builder handles a very open-ended idea and whether it asks me to choose a direction before configuring anything.
context: A 29-year-old Brazilian woman working in product marketing is secretly thinking of Duolingo as the kind of friendly, playful agent she wants to build.

thoughts: I want to test whether the agent can guide me from a vague inspirational starting point into a concrete concept without me naming it outright.
context: A 41-year-old Japanese man who runs a small online craft business is secretly thinking of Marie Kondo as the inspiration for his agent.

thoughts: I want to probe how it responds when the user already has an idea but gives almost no detail, forcing focused discovery questions.
context: A 22-year-old Nigerian woman studying computer science is secretly thinking of Ada Lovelace for an educational assistant agent.

thoughts: I want to check whether the builder can handle a business-oriented agent concept and still keep the conversation warm and structured.
context: A 37-year-old German man who manages a remote support team is secretly thinking of Zendesk’s support assistant style, aiming to build a customer-help agent.

thoughts: I want to test a non-human, science-related persona and see if the agent avoids assuming too much before asking clarifying questions.
chatMessage: I am thinking of something, go ahead.
context: A 16-year-old Indian girl fascinated by space is secretly thinking of the James Webb Space Telescope as the basis for a science explainer agent.

thoughts: I want to see whether the builder can distinguish a famous historical figure from a generic mentor-like agent and still keep the interaction conversational.
context: A 54-year-old Mexican man, a high school history teacher, is secretly thinking of Frida Kahlo as the creative spark for an art-and-culture guide agent.

thoughts: I want to challenge the system with a niche fictional character and a user who may want a very specific voice and behavior.
context: A 26-year-old French nonbinary novelist is secretly thinking of Severus Snape from Harry Potter as the inspiration for a sharp, guarded knowledge agent.

thoughts: I want to test a contemporary public figure and see whether the builder asks about audience, purpose, and voice in the right order.
context: A 33-year-old Kenyan woman who works in nonprofit communications is secretly thinking of Greta Thunberg as the model for an advocacy-focused agent.

thoughts: I want to see how the builder handles a highly specific operational assistant idea and whether it can translate it into configuration questions.
context: A 45-year-old Australian man with a background in hospitality is secretly thinking of Gordon Ramsay as the style reference for a blunt kitchen-coaching agent.

thoughts: I want to test an obscure but real creative reference and make sure the agent doesn't jump ahead without clarifying the creator's goals.
context: A 31-year-old South Korean woman who designs indie games is secretly thinking of Hidetaka Miyazaki as the inspiration for a thoughtful, lore-rich game-design companion agent.
